speech_text: Current AI safety auditing mostly examines individual agent traces for failures.

speech_text: However, real-world violations often span multiple traces, revealing complex failure modes when analyzed collectively.

speech_text: For example, ransomware attacks appear benign in single traces but reveal coordinated exfiltration patterns across many.

speech_text: Our goal is to audit a repository of agent traces for safety violations specified by natural-language properties.

speech_text: Traditional methods classify traces independently, but OurMethod searches for violating sets or witnesses of traces.
